name: Tomato, Shallot, and Cucumber Salad
recipeIngredient: 6 peeled shallots - cut in half if large
1/2 lb tomatoes (2 medium tomatoes) - cut into wedges
1 large cucumber, peeled, seeded, and sliced - into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees.
2. Toss the shallots with 1 tablespoon olive oil and season with salt and pepper.
3. Roast for 12 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, place tomatoes and cucumbers in a mixing bowl.
5. Place shallots in a small bowl.
6. Mix in vinegar, tarragon, remaining olive oil, and season.
7. Toss everything together.
